name: logscale-mcp-monorepo
description: Monorepo for LogScale MCP Server + VS Code Extension

scripts.postrelease: node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version; const {execSync}=require('child_process'); execSync('npm version '+v+' --no-git-tag-version', {cwd:'packages/server'}); execSync('npm version '+v+' --no-git-tag-version', {cwd:'packages/vscode-extension'}); execSync('git add packages/server/package.json packages/vscode-extension/package.json'); execSync('git commit --amend --no-edit');"
